calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-14-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Dennis Hayashi; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:28 am and conlcuding at 9:35 am.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau Inc. is represented by Gorge Aposhian, Esq.
Defendant Jimmy Walton not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

MELISSA KLOPSTOCK is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau Inc., and against Defendant Jimmy Walton, as follows:

1. Damages: $124,350.17
2. Prejudgment Interest: $37,096.67
3. Costs: $1,089.38
4. Attorney fees: $1,200.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $162,736.22

Proposed judgment signed and filed.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2025 Continued To Jul-08-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Dec-20-2024 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-11-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
